overall.description: Aerial top-down view of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring two characters with energy effects fighting in a circular neon-lit intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 with a slowly rotating camera perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular cyberpunk plaza with radiating highways

character with red energy effects fighting in the plaza center

entered.detail: circular intersection with glowing neon lights arranged in concentric rings
tall building with prominent vertical yellow lighting strips
dark glass tower with scattered window lights
multiple highways radiating outward from the circular plaza like spokes

segments.scene_description: Aerial view looking straight down at a neon-lit circular plaza in a futuristic city. Two characters with glowing energy effects fight in the center while the camera rotates slowly. Surrounding skyscrapers with yellow and neon lighting frame the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular cyberpunk plaza with neon ground signage

events.description: red neon 'CYBERPUNK' ground signage rotates into view on the right side of the plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing to rotate above the plaza, now revealing the neon ground signage while observing the ongoing combat

notable_agents.action: blue energy character continuing to engage in combat with red energy character

entered.detail: large red neon text 'CYBERPUNK' embedded in the ground on the plaza's right side

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its clockwise rotation, revealing prominent red neon 'CYBERPUNK' signage on the ground. The two characters continue fighting in the center of the circular plaza, surrounded by the glowing highway ramps and towering buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial rotation over a neon-lit futuristic plaza, shifting the perspective to reveal bold corporate branding on the city floor. It begins with a top-down view of two characters clashing with glowing energy effects in the center of a circular intersection, framed by the yellow lights of surrounding skyscrapers. As the camera rotates slowly clockwise, the focus expands to encompass the glowing highway ramps and the towering architecture of the cyberpunk cityscape. The scene then shifts to reveal prominent red neon signage spelling out CYBERPUNK across the ground, while the fight continues beneath the rotating lens.
